# I Display a Cookie Banner on WPBeginner. Here's Why...

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-11 18:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 832

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Recently, one of our readers asked me why WPBeginner displays a
cookie consent banner and how we handle visitor privacy.

That banner you see isn't just for show… It's actually powered by
WPConsent 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.3cfVBGGSbz-50zwShJz_txMzHKgimQSEngBExXEWPEQ )
, a plugin I developed to manage cookie consent on my own
websites.

The free WPConsent plugin for WordPress 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.3cfVBGGSbz-50zwShJz_txMzHKgimQSEngBExXEWPEQ )

While there are many cookie consent tools, they were either too
expensive or did not have the right features for small
businesses.

That is why I built WPConsent.

- It’s a privacy-first solution that keeps all data right where
it belongs – on your own server.

- It automatically blocks cookies until visitors give explicit
permission, ensuring true compliance with privacy laws.

- It makes it easy to create cookie consent banners and manage
permissions.

After months of development and testing, I had exactly what I
needed: a privacy-first solution that keeps me GDPR and CCPA
compliant without sacrificing control over user data.

The response from other site owners was overwhelming—everyone
wanted the same level of privacy protection.

So I decided to make WPConsent freely available to the WordPress
community.

👉 Download the free WPConsent Plugin on WordPress.org! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.3cfVBGGSbz-50zwShJz_txMzHKgimQSEngBExXEWPEQ )
 👈

Imagine the peace of mind knowing your visitors' consent data is
truly private and completely under your control, right on your
own site.

That’s WPConsent for you :)

Until next time,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
